##NAMES=Carrollite
##RRUFFID=R040165
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=CuCo_2_S_4_
##LOCALITY=Katanga, Democratic Republic of the Congo
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=University of Arizona Mineral Museum
##DESCRIPTION=Steel gray octahedral crystals that have a tarnished exterior
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R040165
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Cu_0.97_Fe_0.03_)Co_1.98_S_4_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.4784 b: 9.4784 c: 9.4784 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 851.54 crystal system: cubic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
